features.name: enum type declaration in module
features.description: Code should include an enum type declaration within a module scope using SystemVerilog enum syntax

features.name: case statement with enum expression
features.description: Code should include a case statement that switches on an enum-typed expression

features.name: enum case item in case statement
features.description: Code should include a case item that uses an enum literal value

features.name: default case in enum case statement
features.description: Code should include a default case item within a case statement switching on an enum
